office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy, oversee departments and public works, and represent the county on regional boards.
race_blurb: Incumbent Jack Miller faces Bill Warren, for whom only filing-level evidence was located.

candidates.summary: Miller is the incumbent District 3 commissioner and represents Columbia County on a regional aging and long-term-care board.
highlights: Serves as the incumbent District 3 commissioner [S1][S3]
Represents the county on a regional governance board [S2]

experience.basis: Incumbent county and regional-board service support a proven-record placement, while the dossier does not establish long tenure or specific accomplishments.

candidates.summary: Warren is an active District 3 candidate whose dossier contains no identity-safe biography or detailed platform.
highlights: Official election records verify the candidacy [S1]
